title: podman update 3.x to 4.x: KeyError: 'exitcommand'
body:
Updating podman from v3.x to v4.x broke containers creation, it seems containers info dict has changed since v3:

```
An exception occurred during task execution. To see the full traceback, use -vvv. The error was: KeyError: 'exitcommand'
fatal: [dev-backend-eu3.strikerz.inc]: FAILED! => {"changed": false, "module_stderr": "Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "master:/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/ansible_mitogen/runner.py", line 975, in _run
    self._run_code(code, mod)
  File "master:/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/ansible_mitogen/runner.py", line 939, in _run_code
    exec(code, vars(mod))
  File "master:/builds/ftxb/release/vendor/collections/ansible_collections/containers/podman/plugins/modules/podman_container.py", line 1023, in <module>
  File "master:/builds/ftxb/release/vendor/collections/ansible_collections/containers/podman/plugins/modules/podman_container.py", line 1018, in main
  File "master:/builds/ftxb/release/vendor/collections/ansible_collections/containers/podman/plugins/module_utils/podman/podman_container_lib.py", line 1643, in execute
    process_action()
  File "master:/builds/ftxb/release/vendor/collections/ansible_collections/containers/podman/plugins/module_utils/podman/podman_container_lib.py", line 1536, in make_started
    (self.container.different or self.recreate):
  File "master:/builds/ftxb/release/vendor/collections/ansible_collections/containers/podman/plugins/module_utils/podman/podman_container_lib.py", line 1336, in different
    is_different = diffcheck.is_different()
  File "master:/builds/ftxb/release/vendor/collections/ansible_collections/containers/podman/plugins/module_utils/podman/podman_container_lib.py", line 1263, in is_different
    if dff_func():
  File "master:/builds/ftxb/release/vendor/collections/ansible_collections/containers/podman/plugins/module_utils/podman/podman_container_lib.py", line 965, in diffparam_log_level
    excom = self.info['exitcommand']
KeyError: 'exitcommand'
", "module_stdout": "", "msg": "MODULE FAILURE
See stdout/stderr for the exact error", "rc": 1}
```

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug
